chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 796 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.01.2018. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Asif Ahmed Leghari, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. along with P.I. Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, SIP Dileejan Rind on behalf of Incharge CIA Hyderabad and Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad. -------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instructions of the petitioner does not press this petition which is disposed of as not pressed along with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.
